summary: Completed e2e testing of admin display toggles (show_fees_alert, show_freeze_alert) and KYC approval email features. All backend tests pass (23/23). Display toggles work correctly in admin panel and affect user dashboard visibility.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings in console due to span/tr nesting in table - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well implemented - display toggles correctly integrated in both backend model and frontend components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Display toggles (show_fees_alert, show_freeze_alert) tested and working. Toggle controls are in Admin Edit User -> Actions tab. When toggle is OFF, corresponding alert is hidden from user dashboard. KYC approval flow triggers password reset email with link.
verified_features: Admin display toggles - show_fees_alert toggle works in admin panel Actions tab
Admin display toggles - show_freeze_alert toggle works in admin panel Actions tab
User dashboard - freeze alert respects show_freeze_alert toggle (hidden when false, visible when true)
User dashboard - fees alert respects show_fees_alert toggle (requires actual unpaid fees in transactions)
KYC approval email - sends password reset email when admin approves KYC for frozen users
Toggle state persistence - changes saved correctly via Save Changes button
notes: The fees alert only shows when there are actual transactions with fee_paid=false, not just based on total_unpaid_fees field on user model
The toggle controls have clear UI with 'Visible/Hidden' labels and explanatory notes
